questions.question: Which Indian institution has developed an affordable device that is capable of rapidly separating plasma from blood and purifying water, priced at ₹1,000?
A free trade arrangement of the SAARC countries, the South Asian Free Trade Area (SAFTA), came into force in which year?
Which indigenously developed missile was successfully test fired by DRDO and Indian Navy on 26 March 2025?
The inaugural edition of India's first major naval exercise 'AIKEYME' was held off the coast of which African country in April 2025?
[October 2024] Mongla Port, recently seen in the news for strategic development and trade ties, is located in which country?
Cabinet minister Kinjarapu Ram Mohan Naidu was related to which ministry in May 2025, who was named in the World Economic Forum (WEF) Young Global Leaders list 2025?
questions.option_3: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

questions.question: The naval vessel ‘Tavasya’ launched in 2025 is classified as a:

Which Indian state topped the Fiscal Health Index 2025 released by NITI Aayog?
Which event escalated the Israel–Iran conflict in June 2025?
questions.option_1: Israeli preemptive strike on Iranian nuclear facilities
questions.option_2: Collapse of the Joint Comprehensive Plan of Action (JCPoA)
questions.option_3: Iranian missile attack on Tel Aviv

questions.question: Life expectancy in India rose from 58.6 years in 1990 to how many years in 2023 which is the highest recorded since the index began?

Where is the Tata Aircraft Complex, inaugurated in October 2024 for manufacturing C-295 aircrafts, located?
Which Indian organisation hosted the 19ᵗʰ India Digital Summit in January 2025, focusing on the digital ecosystem?
questions.option_3: Internet and Mobile Association of India (IAMAI)
questions.option_4: National Association of Software and Service Companies (NASSCOM)

questions.question: Which international body did Cambodia petition to resolve its border dispute with Thailand in 2025?
What is the primary objective of India's 'Bharat 6G Vision' launched in March 2023?
questions.option_2: To import 6G infrastructure from developed countries
questions.option_3: To commercialise 6G services exclusively in urban areas
questions.option_4: To establish India as a global leader in 6G technology by 2030

questions.question: Announced in 2025, which decommissioned Indian Navy ship will be turned into an underwater museum?
